steps.title: Use the again clue
steps.content: The data-transfer project is "making the data available again." That means the Apollo data's usefulness is being restored after being limited by outdated storage technologies.

steps.title: Choose the restoration meaning
steps.content: Choice A means continuing, not restoring. Choice B means setting up, usually for the first time. Choice D means surpassing. The word that means making useful again fits the project's effect on the data. The answer is C.
